title: INCLUSIVE PARTNERS - 211info
text: DEPARTMENT OF EARLY LEARNING AND CARE CHILD CARE INCLUSIVE PARTNERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Inclusive Partners is a statewide program that supports inclusive practices in child care settings. Works with child care providers serving children who need additional accommodations. Offers technical assistance, consultation, financial supplements, and professional development to promote and sustain inclusive care. Inclusive Partners works with ODHS Self-Sufficiency to coordinate the High Needs program for families with children who have higher needs and are receiving child care subsidy through ERDC or JOBS/TANF. Local ODHS workers, not Inclusive Partners staff, determine eligibility for child care assistance through ERDC or TANF/JOBS. Inclusive Partners staff complete the High Needs Rate Determination Assessment in the child care setting to determine the child’s individual rate and the provider’s consultation and technical assistance needs. Website Eligibility: Providers: Unrestricted Children needing care: Ages 0-17 with physical, developmental, mental, emotional, behavioral, or medical disabilities who require extra support or accommodations to be in child care and who are receiving child care subsidy through Department of Early Learning and Care (ERDC or JOBS/TANF) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 673-2286 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 673-2286 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None. Services and supports may include phone calls, emails, onsite visits or training workshops. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Child Care Mental Health Consultation Programs Child Care Provider Training * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Student Disability Services * Child Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - DIRECT PAY UNIT EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - OREGON PRENATAL TO KINDERGARTEN PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
